name: alibabacloud-elasticsearch-network-manage
description: Alibaba Cloud Elasticsearch Instance Network Management Skill. Use for managing ES instance network configurations including triggering network, Kibana PVL network, white IP list, HTTPS settings, and Kibana SSO authentication. Triggers: "elasticsearch network", "ES network", "kibana pvl", "white ip", "https", "trigger network", "modify white ips", "kibana sso", "kibana authentication".
